title: Automatic Self-Folding Dining Table
description: Arduino Mega-controlled dining table with two motorised folding leaves driven by worm-gear DC motors at hinge pivots, triggered by PIR sensor or button, with stall-detection safety.
objective: Fold/unfold each leaf in < 8 s; 5 kg leaf supported; PIR proximity trigger; stall detection via current sensing; EEPROM position memory.
constraints: 24 V DC; 2× worm-gear motors 20 N·m; BOM < ₹7000; Arduino Mega; silent operation.
supporting_fact_titles: Folding Table Hinge — Self-Locking and Motorised Actuation
design_element_titles: Self-Folding Dining Table — Servo + Worm Gear Hinge
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Self-Folding Dining Table — Servo + Worm: 2× worm-gear motors (20:1) at hinge; limit switches at 0° and 90°; INA219 stall detection.
element_usage_notes.Worm Gear Lead-Screw Linear Actuator: Self-locking 20:1 worm prevents gravity back-drive on 5 kg table leaf.
